title: Therapy room established
goal: Establish the minimal therapy-room setup, the panda on the couch, and the psychologist at frame edge with the panda as the visual center before the confession fully unfolds.

title: Confession lands in the room
goal: Hold the same medium-wide setup after the panda's line has emotionally landed, with her slightly more exposed and the psychologist still calm at the edge of frame.

title: Psychologist considers the confession
goal: Begin the reaction beat on the psychologist in a medium shot as she holds the mug with composed stillness, creating a comedic pause.

title: Mug set down with deliberation
goal: End the reaction beat after the psychologist has taken a sip and set the mug down, preserving the same calm deadpan energy.

title: Question begins
goal: Start on a close-up of the psychologist as she settles into the question, composed and attentive, with the room falling away.

title: Question lands cleanly
goal: Hold the close-up at the end of the line so the psychologist's calm curiosity lands with maximum clarity and minimal movement.

title: Panda gathers emotion
goal: Begin the medium close-up on the panda just before her answer peaks, with tension visible in her posture and hands starting to rise.

title: Neither bursts out
goal: Capture the panda at the emotional peak of her answer with stronger desperate gestures and an earnest, frustrated expression that still feels grounded.

title: Doctor with notes before the turn
goal: Start on a medium close-up of the psychologist looking down at her notes before she lifts her gaze, setting up the final line.

title: Warm final insight
goal: End in a tighter close-up after the subtle dolly-in, with the psychologist looking up through adjusted glasses and landing the final line with calm warmth.
